title: Luxury Lifestyle: Man with Lamborghini
prompt: A realistic, high-quality photograph of a middle-aged South Asian man with short, styled black hair and a well-groomed beard, wearing dark aviator sunglasses. He is sitting confidently on the hood of a sleek, lime-green Lamborghini Aventador. He is dressed in a stylish, casual outfit consisting of a navy blue jacket and a grey patterned scarf. The car is parked on a modern coastal road at sunset, with soft golden hour lighting reflecting off the car's polished surface and his sunglasses. The background shows a blurred view of a luxury villa and palm trees. Cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, photorealistic, sharp focus, professional photography.

title: Modern Executive Office
prompt: A professional portrait of a middle-aged South Asian man with styled black hair and a neat beard, wearing a sharp charcoal grey suit and a white dress shirt. He is sitting behind a large, minimalist mahogany desk in a high-rise office with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a city skyline at dusk. On the desk is a sleek laptop and a glass of water. Soft interior lighting, professional corporate photography, 8k resolution, photorealistic.

title: Luxury Yacht Deck
prompt: A realistic photograph of a South Asian man with a well-groomed beard and dark aviator sunglasses, wearing a white linen shirt and light blue chinos. He is standing on the teak deck of a luxury yacht, leaning against the polished chrome railing. The turquoise ocean waves are in the background under a bright, clear blue sky. High-end travel photography, vibrant colors, sharp focus, 8k resolution.

title: Private Jet Interior
prompt: A high-quality image of a South Asian man with styled black hair and a groomed beard, sitting in a plush cream leather seat inside a private jet. He is looking out the window at the clouds, holding a tablet. The interior is luxurious with wood accents and warm ambient lighting. Cinematic lighting, photorealistic, 8k resolution, detailed textures.

title: Urban Street Style
prompt: A candid-style photograph of a South Asian man with a beard and sunglasses, wearing a black leather jacket over a grey hoodie. He is walking through a busy metropolitan street with neon signs and blurred city traffic in the background. The lighting is cool-toned with a cinematic urban feel. Street photography, sharp focus on subject, 8k resolution, realistic.

title: Mountain Cabin Retreat
prompt: A cozy, realistic image of a South Asian man with a groomed beard, wearing a thick navy blue knit sweater. He is sitting in a rustic wooden chair on a balcony, holding a steaming mug of coffee. In the background are snow-capped mountains and pine trees during a quiet morning. Soft natural light, high-quality textures, photorealistic, 8k.

title: Tech Conference Speaker
prompt: A professional shot of a South Asian man with styled black hair and a beard, wearing a smart-casual navy blazer and a light blue shirt. He is standing on a stage with a blurred digital screen background featuring tech graphics. He has a confident expression, gesturing as if giving a presentation. Event photography, stage lighting, sharp focus, 8k resolution.

title: Desert Safari Adventure
prompt: An adventurous photograph of a South Asian man with a beard and aviator sunglasses, wearing a tan safari shirt and a grey scarf wrapped loosely around his neck. He is standing next to a vintage Land Rover in the middle of a vast desert with golden sand dunes at sunset. Warm, dramatic lighting, epic scale, photorealistic, 8k resolution.

title: Gala Dinner Event
prompt: A sophisticated image of a South Asian man with a neatly groomed beard, wearing a classic black tuxedo with a bow tie. He is standing in a grand ballroom with crystal chandeliers and elegantly dressed guests blurred in the background. He is holding a glass of sparkling water. Luxury event photography, elegant atmosphere, sharp focus, 8k resolution.

title: Modern Art Gallery
prompt: A realistic photograph of a South Asian man with styled hair and a beard, wearing a minimalist black turtleneck and a grey overcoat. He is standing in a brightly lit, white-walled modern art gallery, thoughtfully looking at a large abstract painting. Clean composition, artistic lighting, photorealistic, 8k resolution.

title: High-Speed Sports Car
prompt: A dynamic shot of a South Asian man with a beard and sunglasses, sitting in the driver's seat of a red Ferrari. The interior is high-tech with carbon fiber accents. Through the windshield, a blurred racetrack is visible, conveying speed. Dramatic lighting, sharp focus on the man's face, cinematic action, 8k resolution.
